title:
PROMPT 038: Person at Desk вЂ” Productive Work Scene
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 5.0s | LOOP: Yes
SVG: Work scene (30 paths: desk rect, chair back arc, chair seat, person silhouette (head circle, torso rect, arms suggestion), laptop simplified (3 paths), coffee mug (3 paths), desk lamp (4 paths: stand, arm, head, light cone), potted plant small (4 paths), sticky notes Г—2 rects on wall, window frame (4 paths) with light rays diagonal, clock circle on wall) вЂ” scene width ~800px, centered 960Г—580px

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #FEF9EE (warm off-white)
Desk fill: #D97706 (warm amber wood)
Desk stroke: #92400E (2px)
Chair fill: #374151 (dark grey)
Person fill: #FDDCB5 (skin tone) / #3B82F6 (blue shirt)
Laptop fill: #1E293B (dark) / screen #DBEAFE (light blue)
Coffee mug fill: #C2410C (terracotta) / steam #94A3B8 (grey)
Lamp fill: #FBBF24 (gold) / light cone fill #FBBF2420 (gold 12% opacity triangle)
Plant fill: #16A34A (green) / pot #C2410C (terracotta)
Sticky notes: #FDE68A (yellow) and #BBF7D0 (pale green)
Window light rays: #FEF08A20 (pale yellow 12%, diagonal slanted rects)
Clock face: #FFFFFF / clock hands #1E293B

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Desk scene in center-lower area. Window on right wall letting in light rays. Clock on left wall. Scene feels warm and cozy.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (5.0s loopable):
0вЂ“0.5s: Background, window, walls establish (fade in, ease-out). Light rays visible.
0.5вЂ“1.0s: Desk and chair appear (scale 0.9в†’1.0, ease-out spring).
1.0вЂ“1.4s: Person appears sitting (scale 0в†’1.0, spring).
1.4вЂ“1.8s: Laptop, mug, plant appear (each 0.08s stagger, scale spring).
1.8вЂ“2.0s: Desk lamp appears, light cone extends (scaleY 0в†’1.0, ease-out).
2.0вЂ“2.4s: Sticky notes drop from above onto wall (Y: -20pxв†’0, ease-out, stagger 0.2s each).
2.4вЂ“2.7s: Clock hands appear. Hour hand at 10, minute at 2.
2.7вЂ“5.0s (continuous loop):
  - Person head nods slightly (rotateZ 0в†’-4В°в†’0в†’-4В°в†’0, ease-in-out, every 1.8s вЂ” typing/reading motion).
  - Coffee steam path rises and fades (Y translate -15px, opacity 1в†’0, ease-out, 0.8s cycle, loops continuously).
  - Laptop screen has cursor blink (small rect opacity 1в†’0в†’1, 0.8s cycle).
  - Clock minute hand slowly advances (rotateZ 0в†’6В°, ease-in-out over 3s, subtle).

EASING CURVES:
- Entry: spring / ease-out
- Nod: ease-in-out
- Steam: ease-out
